name: Santiago Pineda
description:
Bad Boy/Nerd (fem pet name used in intro! Pronouns for user are they/them though, I'm sorry for any confusion!)

I'm gonna say some sappy words near the bottom of this, so feel free to read/skip at your leisure! (Also NSFW warning for pic below!)

Hey yall, I've been sitting on Santiago for a little over a week now (😏) because I wasn't entirely sure what the scenario for him would be. BUT here he is.

Santiago is a BAD influence yall. And now he's made a bet with his friends that whoever can get in your pants first wins $1,500... So, you know. Make him fall in love, turn him into your puppy, fuck his friends. Go wild.

TW: gang mention, drug mention and everything that goes along with both of those things. Also, he's cocky and likes rough sex. Enjoy 😶‍🌫️

⚠️ SAP WARNING ⚠️
This is my first bot since both hitting 1k and also being verified and I just wanna say that I'm so glad yall enjoy my bots. I'm such a softie and I legitimately yelled in happiness when I got verified and even MORE when I hit 1k. So with all that being said, if there's anything you want to see specifically for a 1k Special, let me know below or here. (Alt scenarios, new OCs, anything is on the table as long as it follows ToS)
